headline: Kraft Heinz Split And Leadership Shift Reframe Valuation And Dividend Questions
summary: Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) plans to split into two companies in 2026, separating its global business from its North American grocery operation. The company is pairing this corporate split with a leadership change, appointing a new President for its North America segment. The move is being framed alongside internal programs focused on AI adoption and supply chain modernization. Kraft Heinz, known for brands that sit in the center of many grocery aisles, is reshaping how its global and North...
